sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince Optimal f=0.01 applied parametrically across return distribution (-3σ to +3σ). Position size scales with standard deviation units to maximize geometric growth (HPR). Parametric approach maps volatility to dollar P&L exposure.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by Optimal f=0.01, which scales the dollar risk amount based on the standard deviation of returns to produce a holding period return (HPR) that maximizes geometric growth across the distribution of outcomes.
